title: Scholarships prizes and awards
description: What to declare in your tax return and tax you pay on scholarships, prizes and awards.
keywords: scholarship, scholarships and tax, prizes, awards, scholarship income

child_links.title: Scholarship payments
child_links.description: Scholarships you receive or made on your behalf as a student at a school, college or university may be exempt income.

child_links.title: Prizes and awards
child_links.description: You must declare certain prizes and awards you receive in your tax return.
